loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing month-to-date active and reactive energy for outgoing feeders; capacity and target values are not measured for this panel.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing apparent power (kVA), active power (kW), and reactive power (kVAr) from primary feeders; Load Factor, Rated Capacity, and Worst Peak markers are omitted because the member meters do not log load factor or rated capacity, and no windowed-peak reducer exists for worst-peak kVA.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing Worst Peak and Feeder Demand series (UPS, BPDB, HHF) aggregated from member meters; Load Factor and Critical Threshold are not measured by this asset's live data.
